prompt: A sunlit street café portrait of a stylish young woman seated on a wicker bistro chair on cobblestones, spring blossoms and historic stone buildings in soft focus behind her. She wears a light blue linen long blazer over a white silk camisole and wide-leg trousers, white sneakers, gold hoop earrings and layered delicate necklaces, sunglasses perched on her head. She smiles warmly, holding a floral patterned takeaway coffee cup, a quilted cream shoulder bag at her side, a vase of mixed pastel flowers and a leather notebook on the marble table. Warm golden hour backlight, rim light on hair, shallow depth of field, soft creamy bokeh, natural skin tones, cinematic editorial fashion style, photorealistic, high resolution, 85mm portrait lens feel, f/1.8, gentle film grain, pastel color grading, inviting lifestyle mood.
